items.title: qwen-lora-finetune
items.summary: Fine-tune Qwen2.5-Coder for code generation on your own dataset using QLoRA. Train on JSONL instruction-response pairs and produce a shareable ~16 MB LoRA adapter.
items.summary_cn: 使用QLoRA对Qwen2.5-Coder进行微调，以便在您自己的数据集上生成代码。培训JSONL指令-响应对，并生产可共享的约16 MB LoRA适配器。
items.comment: AI 领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。

items.title: AgriGenie-AI
items.summary: An AI-powered smart farming platform that helps farmers with crop recommendations, weather insights, and an intelligent AI assistant using Streamlit and Google Gemini.
items.summary_cn: 一个人工智能驱动的智能农业平台，可帮助农民提供作物推荐、天气洞察以及使用Streamlit和Google Gemini的智能人工智能助手。
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Distributed Attacks in Persistent-State AI Control
items.title_cn: 持久状态AI控制中的分布式攻击
items.summary: As AI coding agents become more autonomous, they increasingly ship code iteratively, with the codebase persisting across sessions. This persistence creates a new attack surface: a misaligned or prompt-injected agent can distribute attacks across pull requests (PRs) and time its payload for the PR wi...
items.summary_cn: 随着人工智能编码代理变得更加自主，它们越来越多地迭代交付代码，代码库在多个会话中持续存在。这种持久性创建了一个新的攻击面：未对齐或提示注入的代理可以跨拉取请求（ PR ）分发攻击，并为PR wi定时其有效负载...
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: LACUNA: A Testbed for Evaluating Localization Precision for LLM Unlearning
items.title_cn: LACUNA ： LLM Unlearning本地化精度评估测试平台
items.summary: LLMs memorize sensitive training data, including personally identifiable information (PII), creating a pressing need for reliable post hoc removal methods. Unlearning has emerged as a promising solution, with state-of-the-art(SOTA) methods often following a localize-first, unlearn-second paradigm th...
items.summary_cn: LLM会记住敏感的培训数据，包括个人身份信息(PII) ，因此迫切需要可靠的事后移除方法。未学习已成为一种有前途的解决方案，最先进的（ SOTA ）方法通常遵循本地化优先、未学习秒的范式...
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: Program-as-Weights: A Programming Paradigm for Fuzzy Functions
items.title_cn: 权重编程：模糊函数的编程范式
items.summary: Many everyday programming tasks resist clean rule-based implementation, such as alerting on important log lines, repairing malformed JSON, or ranking search results by intent, and are increasingly outsourced to large language model APIs at the cost of locality, reproducibility, and price. We propose...
items.summary_cn: 许多日常编程任务抵制基于规则的干净实现，例如在重要日志行上发出警报、修复格式错误的JSON或按意图对搜索结果进行排名，并且越来越多地外包给大型语言模型API ，而牺牲了本地性、可重复性和价格。我们建议...
items.comment: 商业模型再升级，功能看着牛，钱包要捂紧。

items.title: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups
items.title_cn: Station F成为欧洲最热门人工智能初创公司的发射台
items.summary: Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, is gearing up for a new edition of its F/ai accelerator program in a bid to strengthen its positioning as a stepping stone for promising AI startups.
items.summary_cn: 由法国亿万富翁泽维尔·尼尔（ Xavier Niel ）创立的巴黎创业中心Station F正在为其新版F/ai加速器计划做准备，以加强其作为有前途的人工智能创业公司垫脚石的地位。
items.comment: 又是一个「史上最强」，基准测试刷得飞起，实际应用场景待检验。

items.title: Smart glasses maker Even Realities hits $1B valuation with $150M funding led by Meituan, Tencent
items.title_cn: 智能眼镜制造商Even Realities以美团、腾讯领投的1.5亿美元资金达到10亿美元估值
items.summary: Even Realities, an ex-Apple team building camera-free smart glasses, raised $150 million from Meituan and Tencent at a $1 billion valuation.
items.summary_cn: 即使是前苹果团队打造的无相机智能眼镜Realities ，也以10亿美元的估值从美团和腾讯筹集了1.5亿美元。
items.comment: 开源项目值得支持，文档和社区活跃度比 star 数更重要。

items.title: What is Bending Spoons? The little-known AOL and Vimeo owner that’s now public
items.title_cn: 什么是弯曲勺？这位鲜为人知的AOL和Vimeo所有者现已上市
items.summary: Bending Spoons remains largely unknown, even as its portfolio of products has served more than a billion people.
items.summary_cn: 尽管Bending Spoons的产品组合已服务超过10亿人，但其产品组合在很大程度上仍然未知。
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title_cn: 回归均值：关于LLM和新语言的悄然死亡
